headline: Domino's (NASDAQ:DPZ) Misses Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
summary: Fast-food pizza chain Domino’s (NASDAQ:DPZ) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026 as sales rose 3.5% year on year to $1.15 billion. Its GAAP profit of $4.13 per share was 3.3% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
